required_preferences.fact: No longer expects his younger son to help at the shop during evenings or most weekends for the next six months; relies on employees for those shifts due to his son's frequent soccer practices and tournaments

supersedes.fact: Now relies primarily on his younger son to help at the shop when possible; does not expect his older son to cover regular shifts since he works at the bookstore

required_preferences.fact: Conducts weekly digital inventory and orders exclusively through the co-op’s online platform as required, fully replacing in-person batch shopping for shop supplies; now makes supplemental personal grocery trips separately

supersedes.fact: Batch shops for groceries and supplies every Wednesday evening—never shops daily

required_preferences.fact: Plans annual camping trips four months in advance—never books last-minute
Only discusses shop business with family during scheduled Sunday dinners; avoids mixing shop talk during weekday meals
Brews experimental coffee recipes on Sundays during off-peak hours—never during busy weekday mornings
Consults with his accountant before making any new lease commitments or major expense changes—a step he previously handled solo.

persona: A small business owner managing payroll for five employees
